The '''Survivor''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]–manufactured class of [[lifeboat]]. They had enough fuel for six [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] of spaceflight, and a week's worth of consumables. Emergency gear included [[Tent/Legends|tents]], [[thermosuit]]s, portable [[Hand scanner/Legends|hand scanners]], [[substance analyzer]]s, and a [[hunting rifle]] for small game.<ref name="HSCS" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''
